headline: Apple Robot Could Someday Make It To Consumers' Living Rooms, Says Gurman, As Cupertino's Wait For Next Big Thing After iPhone Prolongs
summary: Apple has neither made a radical overhaul of its existing product lineups nor introduced any significant new products, leading to a stagnation in revenue.

headline: Tech Titans Clash: Mark Zuckerberg Rises As Elon Musk Falters In Billionaire Rankings
summary: Meta's CEO Mark Zuckerberg has overtaken Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA), in the Bloomberg Billionaires Index.

headline: Sundar Pichai's Google Grapples With AI Mishaps Amid Worker Criticism, Yet Holds Title Of America's Most Innovative Company
summary: Alphabet Inc. retains its title as "America's Most Innovative Company 2024" amid internal criticism and AI challenges, with Sundar Pichai addressing inaccuracies in the Gemini AI chatbot and facing calls for leadership changes.

headline: US Manufacturing Hits 18-Month High, China's Growth Could Trigger Deflation And More: Economics Weekly Roundup
summary: This week's top stories highlight significant developments, including the U.S. manufacturing sector reaching an 18-month high, potential deflation from China's manufacturing growth, a robust U.S. labor market in March, critiques of the Federal Reserve's data-dependent approach, and warnings of a potential U.S. debt crisis by 2025.

headline: Apple's AI Triumph, Tesla's Talent War And Dan Ives Predicts Tech Stock Rally: Top Artificial Intelligence Updates This Week
summary: From Apple outpacing OpenAI with new AI model to Amazon facing scrutiny over its 'Just Walk Out' technology, check out top AI news this week.

headline: Apple's Big Week: AI Breakthrough, Layoffs, iPhone 16 Pro Rumors And More
summary: Apple made several headlines this week. From a new AI model to the company's 48th birthday, here's a recap of the major stories that unfolded.
